scripts.dev: npm run build -w @cms-demo/cms-contract && concurrently -n contract,backend,frontend -c cyan,green,magenta "npm:dev -w @cms-demo/cms-contract" "npm:dev -w @cms-demo/backend" "npm:dev -w @cms-demo/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cms-demo/cms-contract && npm run build -w @cms-demo/backend && npm run build -w @cms-demo/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cms-demo/cms-contract && npm run typecheck -w @cms-demo/backend && npm run typecheck -w @cms-demo/frontend
